fixes.commitMessage: [AI-AGENT] Fix syntax error in FixerAgent by closing dictionary and method
fixes.explanation: The _generate_ai_fix method was truncated, leaving an open dictionary and missing the method/class closing blocks.
The commit_changes method was truncated after checking for changes, failing to actually perform the commit.

fixes.commitMessage: [AI-AGENT] Complete ESLint result parsing in ScannerAgent
fixes.explanation: The ESLint scanning logic was truncated inside a nested loop, preventing JavaScript issue detection.

fixes.commitMessage: [AI-AGENT] Fix truncated status endpoint in main.py
fixes.explanation: The status endpoint was cut off mid-declaration.
